title: cynoglossospermum bungei
intro: Cynoglossospermum bungei, also known as Chinese bugloss, is a plant species in the borage family that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its various health benefits. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and other compounds. In herbal preparations, Cynoglossospermum bungei is often used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, and is also believed to have a range of health benefits, including reducing stress and improving sleep. The plant can be prepared as a tea or decoction, and is also used in some traditional formulas to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
